clusters.justification: Encompasses the broad functional processing of emotional reactivity, valence, and autonomic arousal states primarily mediated by the extended limbic and salience systems.
Captures the computational domain of reward processing, incentive-guided motivation, and value-based decision-making rooted in striato-cortical circuitry.
Represents the high-level functional axis of internally-directed representations concerning the self, interpersonal relations, and social constructs linked to default mode network co-activation.
